narrative:
Xenia municipal court district has 50,423 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -7.6% D−R vs -26.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
